div.p: Move the dividend into the hardwired rax register. The divisor is stored in any available general purpose register (e.g., r8).
The idiv instruction expects a 128-bit dividend in rdx:rax. cqo sign-extends rax into rdx.
Execute idiv. Hardware divides rdx:rax by the operand. Quotient is forced into rax, remainder into rdx.
